mapper.select: SELECT story_id AS storyId, title, summary, cover_image AS coverImage, created_at AS createdAt FROM stories ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT page_id AS pageId, story_id AS storyId, page_number AS pageNumber, content_text AS contentText, content_image AS contentImage FROM story_pages WHERE story_id = #{storyId} ORDER BY page_number ASC
SELECT story_id AS storyId, title, summary, cover_image AS coverImage, created_at AS createdAt FROM stories WHERE story_id = #{storyId}
SELECT story_id AS storyId, title, summary, cover_image AS coverImage, created_at AS createdAt FROM stories WHERE title = #{title} LIMIT 1
SELECT story_id AS storyId, title, summary, cover_image AS coverImage, created_at AS createdAt FROM stories WHERE story_id = #{storyId}
